'''Derra'makin''' was the [[Grand Daern]] of the [[Marasan]] people. He headed the Marasan government, called the [[Mindnet]], making decisions based on information from the lesser Marasan elected officials (the [[Electnode]]s.) Like almost all Marasans, he was a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]], with a sophisticated computer implant used for communication and rapid computation.

When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] conquered the Marasan people on [[Marasai]] and its colonies in the [[Marasa Nebula/Legends|Marasa Nebula]], Derra'makin was forced to flee. During the Imperial occupation, he stayed hidden on one of the colony worlds.
